# SIM Index Routes

## User routes

| Route | Title | Audiences | Steps |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `route/build-audio-workbench` | Build an audio workbench | user, code | `feature/sim-audio-daw/audio-graph-workbench` - The graph row collects the DSP and plugin recipes for local construction.<br>`feature/sim-audio-daw/audio-device-providers` - The provider row selects a modeled or host-backed audio target.<br>`recipe/sim-audio-daw/crates/sim-lib-audio-graph-core/01-basics/copy-node` - The copy-node recipe is the smallest graph example. |
| `route/build-music-performance` | Build a music performance | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-music/pitch-and-sound-vocabulary` - The vocabulary row supplies pitch and sound descriptors.<br>`feature/sim-music/midi-notation-workflows` - The MIDI row moves material into and out of performance formats.<br>`feature/sim-music/exact-music-analysis-and-transform` - The exact music row owns reusable music objects, analysis descriptors, and sequence transforms.<br>`feature/sim-music/daw-session-runtime` - The DAW session row supplies the reusable session graph around the performance.<br>`feature/sim-music/synth-performance-workbench` - The synth row turns that material into local or browser-backed sound.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-synth/01-basics/subtractive-preset` - The preset recipe is the smallest synth example. |
| `route/compose-genai` | Compose GenAI from reusable components | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-agent-net/bridge-runtime` - BRIDGE builds and checks the ASK packet, output contract, and repair loop.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/model-runner-framework` - Model placement supplies the late-bound EvalFabric target.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/genai-assembly` - The assembly feature ties the reusable pieces into one recipe.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/01-basics/genai-assembly` - The checked recipe is the runnable composition surface. |
| `route/control-construction-project` | Control a construction project | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-construction/project-control` - The project-control row owns the identity, charter, governance, capability, visibility, and evidence readiness vocabulary.<br>`recipe/sim-construction/crates/sim-lib-construction-project/01-basics/project-charter` - The project-charter recipe shows a synthetic accepted charter and governance record with reference-only evidence. |
| `route/exchange-construction-schedule` | Exchange a construction schedule | user, code | `feature/sim-construction/mspdi-schedule-exchange` - The MSPDI exchange row owns the XML codec and fidelity tests.<br>`recipe/sim-construction/crates/sim-codec-mspdi/01-basics/mspdi-round-trip` - The round-trip recipe shows a modeled Gantt schedule crossing the MSPDI boundary. |
| `route/find-whether-feature-exists` | Find whether a feature exists or reuse existing code | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-index/core` - The SIM Index core row owns generated graph queries, strict fixpoint checks, overlap checks, and duplicate implementation prevention.<br>`spec-test/sim-tooling/src/index_fixpoint_tests` - The checked fixpoint test proves the index can index and validate itself. |
| `route/import-export-smf` | Import and export SMF | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-music/midi-notation-workflows` - The MIDI row owns MIDI event, SMF, stream, and notation interchange.<br>`feature/sim-music/exact-music-analysis-and-transform` - The exact music row owns the lift and lower adapters between MIDI tracks and music descriptors.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-midi-smf/01-basics/file-metadata` - The SMF metadata recipe proves the file owner.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-lift/01-basics/from-midi-track` - The lift recipe imports MIDI track material into music descriptors.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-lower/01-basics/to-midi-track` - The lower recipe exports music descriptors back to MIDI track material. |
| `route/lift-audio-features` | Analyze current audio lift into music descriptors | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-music/audio-lift-and-render` - The audio row owns PCM feature lift, spectral summaries, and offline render evidence for audio analysis.<br>`feature/sim-music/exact-music-analysis-and-transform` - The music analysis row owns pitch histograms and exact object descriptors that consume lifted musical material.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-sound-audio-lift/01-basics/pcm-features` - The PCM feature recipe is the current audio-lift specimen.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-analysis/01-basics/pitch-histogram` - The pitch-histogram recipe is the current exact music analysis specimen. |
| `route/open-web-workspace` | Open a web workspace | user | `feature/sim-web/web-shell-host` - The web shell row owns the serve, browse, and atelier commands.<br>`feature/sim-web/view-surface` - The view row supplies the reversible surfaces shown by the browser host.<br>`recipe/sim-web/crates/sim-web-shell/01-basics/open-workspace` - The open-workspace recipe is the shortest browser-host example. |
| `route/place-construction-schedule-in-powerproject` | Place a construction schedule in Powerproject | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-construction/mspdi-schedule-exchange` - The MSPDI exchange row owns the portable schedule document crossing.<br>`feature/sim-construction/powerproject-schedule-placement` - The Powerproject row owns modeled receipts, gated desktop export, and Dataverse operation planning.<br>`recipe/sim-construction/crates/sim-site-powerproject/01-basics/powerproject-placement` - The placement recipe shows the modeled OLE receipt and Project for the web operation set. |
| `route/prepare-balanced-ledger` | Prepare a balanced ledger | user, code | `feature/sim-ledger/ledger-command` - The command row owns the operational entry point.<br>`recipe/sim-ledger/crates/sim-ledger/01-basics/balanced-year` - The balanced-year recipe shows the expected yearly voucher shape. |
| `route/read-construction-items-from-dalux` | Read construction field items from Dalux | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-construction/dalux-project-items` - The Dalux row owns modeled item reads, API-identity live gating, response checks, and narrow note patches.<br>`recipe/sim-construction/crates/sim-site-dalux/01-basics/dalux-modeled-items` - The modeled recipe shows synthetic Dalux items crossing into a local office document without live service access. |
| `route/repair-output-contract` | Repair an output contract | user, code | `feature/sim-agent-net/output-contract-repair-cli` - The repair command row owns the operational correction path.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent-runner-core/01-basics/output-contract-repair` - The repair recipe provides the worked contract fixture. |
| `route/replay-content-addressed-fleet` | Replay a content-addressed fleet | user, code | `feature/sim-agent-net/eval-fabric-sites` - The EvalFabric row owns the stream-fabric placement library.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/fabric-fixture-cli` - The fixture command row exposes replay from the CLI surface.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-stream-fabric/01-basics/content-addressed-fleet` - The content-addressed fleet recipe is the replay example. |
| `route/review-office-document` | Review an office document | user, code | `feature/sim-office/document-codecs` - The codec row chooses the file format and round-trip path.<br>`feature/sim-office/document-surfaces` - The surface row renders the document into a reviewable view.<br>`feature/sim-office/office-site-workflows` - The site row connects the document to modeled workplace sources.<br>`recipe/sim-office/crates/sim-lib-doc-surface/01-basics/suite-surface-descriptor` - The suite-surface recipe is the shortest surface example. |
| `route/run-genai-locally` | Run GenAI locally | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-agent-net/model-runner-framework` - The runner framework supplies provider-neutral requests, process adapters, loopback HTTP profiles, and loadable model sites for local GenAI execution.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/bridge-runtime` - BRIDGE carries the checked model-facing packet workflow.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/eval-fabric-sites` - EvalFabric placement resolves the selected local model site.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/01-basics/genai-assembly` - The assembly recipe is the reusable checked exchange run after placing the local model site.<br>`spec-test/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/src/tests/genai_assembly` - The checked specimen runs the same recipe through fake, subprocess, loopback Ollama, native provider, and OpenAI-compatible placements. |
| `route/run-genai-with-provider` | Run GenAI through a provider | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-agent-net/model-runner-framework` - The runner framework owns HTTP provider profiles and the provider-neutral request and response contract.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/bridge-runtime` - BRIDGE keeps provider calls inside checked ASK packets and output validation.<br>`spec-test/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-bridge/src/tests/ask` - The checked ASK specimen validates the exchange contract provider runners answer.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/01-basics/genai-assembly` - The assembly recipe stays backend-neutral while the host places the provider target.<br>`spec-test/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/src/tests/genai_assembly` - The checked specimen runs that recipe through OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenAI-compatible provider placements with replacement and capability checks. |
| `route/serve-over-mcp` | Serve over MCP | user, code | `feature/sim-agent-net/mcp-server` - The MCP row owns the command surface and loaded server libraries.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-mcp-server/01-basics/stdio-bootloader` - The stdio bootloader recipe shows the server entry point. |
| `route/start-a-glasses-plan` | Start a glasses plan | user, code | `feature/sim-run/bootloader` - The bootloader prepares the command runtime.<br>`feature/sim-run/glasses` - The glasses row owns the glasses command surface and loaded glasses libraries.<br>`spec-test/sim-run/crates/sim-run/tests/glasses` - The checked command test exercises the glasses entry point. |
| `route/start-a-sim-session` | Start an interactive SIM session | user | `feature/sim-run/bootloader` - The bootloader prepares the command runtime.<br>`feature/sim-run/repl` - The REPL is the interactive entry point.<br>`recipe/sim-run/01-basics/version` - The first recipe confirms the command path. |
| `route/start-a-watch-plan` | Start a watch plan | user, code | `feature/sim-run/bootloader` - The bootloader prepares the command runtime.<br>`feature/sim-run/watch` - The watch row owns the watch command surface and loaded watch libraries.<br>`spec-test/sim-run/crates/sim-run/tests/watch` - The checked command test exercises the watch entry point. |
| `route/start-from-sdk` | Start from the SDK | user, code | `feature/sim-sdk/facade-runtime` - The facade row owns the public command and reversible view surface.<br>`feature/sim-sdk/device-recipes` - The device row gives wearable workflows through facade-level recipes.<br>`recipe/sim-sdk/01-basics/boot-runtime` - The boot-runtime recipe checks the smallest facade path. |
| `route/transform-exact-music` | Transform exact music | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-music/exact-music-analysis-and-transform` - The exact music row owns the object model, sequence transforms, lift/lower adapters, and notation descriptors.<br>`feature/sim-music/pitch-and-sound-vocabulary` - The pitch row supplies the pitch, scale, chord, and tuning vocabulary used by exact transforms.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-transform/01-basics/sequence-transform` - The sequence-transform recipe is the current transform specimen. |

| Route | Title | Audiences | Steps |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `local/sim-run/route/add-table-dir-backend` | Add a Table/Dir backend | code, framework | `feature/sim-run/index-table-dir` - The IndexDir implementation shows a runtime table exposed as an immutable directory.<br>`recipe/sim-run/02-scenarios/index-examples` - The examples recipe exercises table-backed feature-to-specimen lookup. |
| `local/sim-storage/route/add-table-dir-backend` | Add a Table or Dir backend | code, framework | `feature/sim-storage/table-dir-backends` - The backend row owns reusable Table and Dir implementations.<br>`feature/sim-storage/mounted-table-dir-namespace` - The mounted namespace row composes independently owned backends without copying their storage behavior.<br>`feature/sim-storage/contract-emitter` - The emitter row keeps generated storage contract evidence current.<br>`recipe/sim-storage/crates/sim-table-mount/01-basics/backend-composition` - The backend-composition recipe exercises the mounted Table/Dir surface. |
| `route/add-a-codec` | Add a codec | code, framework | `feature/sim-codecs/codec` - Start with the shared codec contract and position rules.<br>`feature/sim-codecs/contract-emitter` - The emitter row keeps generated codec contract evidence current. |
| `route/add-a-language` | Add a language | code, framework | `feature/sim-codecs/codec` - The codec row owns shared positions, limits, and loadable codec contracts.<br>`feature/sim-codecs/expression-syntax-grammars` - Expression syntax rows expose language and grammar subjects with round-trip contracts.<br>`feature/sim-codecs/pratt` - Operator-shaped languages reuse the Pratt syntax surface. |

| `route/add-bridge-packet-codec` | Add a Bridge packet codec | code, framework | `feature/sim-codecs/bridge-packet-codec` - The Bridge packet codec owns the Bridge wire grammar. |

| `route/read-construction-items-from-dalux` | Read construction field items from Dalux | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-construction/dalux-project-items` - The Dalux row owns modeled item reads, API-identity live gating, response checks, and narrow note patches.<br>`recipe/sim-construction/crates/sim-site-dalux/01-basics/dalux-modeled-items` - The modeled recipe shows synthetic Dalux items crossing into a local office document without live service access. |
| `route/repair-output-contract` | Repair an output contract | user, code | `feature/sim-agent-net/output-contract-repair-cli` - The repair command row owns the operational correction path.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent-runner-core/01-basics/output-contract-repair` - The repair recipe provides the worked contract fixture. |
| `route/replay-content-addressed-fleet` | Replay a content-addressed fleet | user, code | `feature/sim-agent-net/eval-fabric-sites` - The EvalFabric row owns the stream-fabric placement library.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/fabric-fixture-cli` - The fixture command row exposes replay from the CLI surface.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-stream-fabric/01-basics/content-addressed-fleet` - The content-addressed fleet recipe is the replay example. |
| `route/review-office-document` | Review an office document | user, code | `feature/sim-office/document-codecs` - The codec row chooses the file format and round-trip path.<br>`feature/sim-office/document-surfaces` - The surface row renders the document into a reviewable view.<br>`feature/sim-office/office-site-workflows` - The site row connects the document to modeled workplace sources.<br>`recipe/sim-office/crates/sim-lib-doc-surface/01-basics/suite-surface-descriptor` - The suite-surface recipe is the shortest surface example. |
| `route/run-genai-locally` | Run GenAI locally | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-agent-net/model-runner-framework` - The runner framework supplies provider-neutral requests, process adapters, loopback HTTP profiles, and loadable model sites for local GenAI execution.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/bridge-runtime` - BRIDGE carries the checked model-facing packet workflow.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/eval-fabric-sites` - EvalFabric placement resolves the selected local model site.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/01-basics/genai-assembly` - The assembly recipe is the reusable checked exchange run after placing the local model site.<br>`spec-test/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/src/tests/genai_assembly` - The checked specimen runs the same recipe through fake, subprocess, loopback Ollama, native provider, and OpenAI-compatible placements. |
| `route/run-genai-with-provider` | Run GenAI through a provider | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-agent-net/model-runner-framework` - The runner framework owns HTTP provider profiles and the provider-neutral request and response contract.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/bridge-runtime` - BRIDGE keeps provider calls inside checked ASK packets and output validation.<br>`spec-test/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-bridge/src/tests/ask` - The checked ASK specimen validates the exchange contract provider runners answer.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/01-basics/genai-assembly` - The assembly recipe stays backend-neutral while the host places the provider target.<br>`spec-test/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/src/tests/genai_assembly` - The checked specimen runs that recipe through OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenAI-compatible provider placements with replacement and capability checks. |
| `route/run-numeric-pipeline` | Run a numeric pipeline | code, framework | `feature/sim-numbers/numeric-pipelines` - The numeric pipeline row owns composed pipeline values and the numeric registry execution path.<br>`spec-test/sim-numbers/crates/sim-lib-numbers-numeric/src/pipeline_run` - The checked pipeline-run specimen proves composed run input parsing and fail-closed tensor-state handling. |
| `route/serve-over-mcp` | Serve over MCP | user, code | `feature/sim-agent-net/mcp-server` - The MCP row owns the command surface and loaded server libraries.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-mcp-server/01-basics/stdio-bootloader` - The stdio bootloader recipe shows the server entry point. |
| `route/start-a-glasses-plan` | Start a glasses plan | user, code | `feature/sim-run/bootloader` - The bootloader prepares the command runtime.<br>`feature/sim-run/glasses` - The glasses row owns the glasses command surface and loaded glasses libraries.<br>`spec-test/sim-run/crates/sim-run/tests/glasses` - The checked command test exercises the glasses entry point. |
| `route/start-a-watch-plan` | Start a watch plan | user, code | `feature/sim-run/bootloader` - The bootloader prepares the command runtime.<br>`feature/sim-run/watch` - The watch row owns the watch command surface and loaded watch libraries.<br>`spec-test/sim-run/crates/sim-run/tests/watch` - The checked command test exercises the watch entry point. |
| `route/start-from-sdk` | Start from the SDK | user, code | `feature/sim-sdk/facade-runtime` - The facade row owns the public command and reversible view surface.<br>`feature/sim-sdk/device-recipes` - The device row gives wearable workflows through facade-level recipes.<br>`recipe/sim-sdk/01-basics/boot-runtime` - The boot-runtime recipe checks the smallest facade path. |
| `route/transform-exact-music` | Transform exact music | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-music/exact-music-analysis-and-transform` - The exact music row owns the object model, sequence transforms, lift/lower adapters, and notation descriptors.<br>`feature/sim-music/pitch-and-sound-vocabulary` - The pitch row supplies the pitch, scale, chord, and tuning vocabulary used by exact transforms.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-transform/01-basics/sequence-transform` - The sequence-transform recipe is the current transform specimen. |
| `route/use-tensor-operations` | Use tensor operations | code, framework | `feature/sim-numbers/tensors` - The tensor row owns the storage-polymorphic runtime value, checked observation, typed tensor descriptors, broadcasting, and matrix-operation libraries.<br>`spec-test/sim-numbers/crates/sim-lib-numbers-tensor/src/implementation/citizen` - The checked tensor citizen specimen proves runtime projection and semantic reconstruction for the canonical Tensor value. |

## Framework routes

| Route | Title | Audiences | Steps |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `local/sim-run/route/add-table-dir-backend` | Add a Table/Dir backend | code, framework | `feature/sim-run/index-table-dir` - The IndexDir implementation shows a runtime table exposed as an immutable directory.<br>`recipe/sim-run/02-scenarios/index-examples` - The examples recipe exercises table-backed feature-to-specimen lookup. |
| `local/sim-storage/route/add-table-dir-backend` | Add a Table or Dir backend | code, framework | `feature/sim-storage/table-dir-backends` - The backend row owns reusable Table and Dir implementations.<br>`feature/sim-storage/mounted-table-dir-namespace` - The mounted namespace row composes independently owned backends without copying their storage behavior.<br>`feature/sim-storage/contract-emitter` - The emitter row keeps generated storage contract evidence current.<br>`recipe/sim-storage/crates/sim-table-mount/01-basics/backend-composition` - The backend-composition recipe exercises the mounted Table/Dir surface. |
| `route/add-a-codec` | Add a codec | code, framework | `feature/sim-codecs/codec` - Start with the shared codec contract and position rules.<br>`feature/sim-codecs/contract-emitter` - The emitter row keeps generated codec contract evidence current. |
| `route/add-a-language` | Add a language | code, framework | `feature/sim-codecs/codec` - The codec row owns shared positions, limits, and loadable codec contracts.<br>`feature/sim-codecs/expression-syntax-grammars` - Expression syntax rows expose language and grammar subjects with round-trip contracts.<br>`feature/sim-codecs/pratt` - Operator-shaped languages reuse the Pratt syntax surface. |
| `route/add-a-packet-codec` | Add a packet codec | code, framework | `feature/sim-codecs/bridge-packet-codec` - The Bridge packet codec owns the Bridge wire grammar.<br>`feature/sim-codecs/wire-protocol-grammars` - The wire grammar row groups packet and byte-level protocol contracts. |
| `route/add-bounded-search-engine` | Add a bounded search engine | code, framework | `feature/sim-discrete/discrete-algebra` - The discrete stack owns reusable algorithmic helpers.<br>`feature/sim-discrete/bounded-search` - The bounded-search row owns deterministic state-space search policy, bounds, receipts, and specimens. |
| `route/add-bridge-packet-codec` | Add a Bridge packet codec | code, framework | `feature/sim-codecs/bridge-packet-codec` - The Bridge packet codec owns the Bridge wire grammar. |
| `route/add-capability-gated-read-eval` | Add capability-gated read-eval | code, framework | `feature/sim-runtime/capabilities-read-eval` - The core row owns read policy, capability checks, and read-construct evidence.<br>`spec-test/sim-runtime/crates/sim-lib-standard-core/src/read_construct` - The read-construct test checks object round trips through standard core. |
| `route/add-citizen-read-construct` | Add a citizen read-construct | code, framework | `feature/sim-citizen/citizen-read-constructs` - The citizen row owns runtime members and read-construct projection.<br>`spec-test/sim-citizen/crates/sim-citizen/src/conformance` - The conformance test checks citizen round-trip behavior. |
| `route/add-cookbook-recipe` | Add a cookbook recipe | code, framework | `feature/sim-foundation/cookbook` - The cookbook row owns reusable recipe metadata. |
| `route/add-discrete-domain-helper` | Add a discrete domain helper | code, framework | `feature/sim-discrete/discrete-algebra` - The discrete row owns algebra, graph, ranking, and spectral helpers. |
| `route/add-eval-fabric-site` | Add an EvalFabric site | code, framework | `feature/sim-agent-net/eval-fabric-sites` - The EvalFabric row owns runner and fleet placement libraries. |
| `route/add-femm-domain-helper` | Add a FEMM domain helper | code, framework | `feature/sim-femm/femm-domain-stack` - The FEMM row owns mesh, field, material, solve, and ODE helpers. |
| `route/add-femm-linear-solver` | Add a FEMM linear solver | code, framework | `feature/sim-femm/linear-solvers` - The linear solver row owns solver contracts, factor handles, iterative kernels, and certificate evidence.<br>`spec-test/sim-femm/crates/sim-lib-femm-solve/src/implementation` - The checked implementation specimen proves solver reuse metadata and residual evidence for certificates. |
| `route/add-finite-enumeration-adapter` | Add a finite enumeration adapter | code, framework | `feature/sim-discrete/discrete-algebra` - The discrete stack owns combinatorics and rank integration.<br>`feature/sim-discrete/finite-enumeration` - The finite enumeration row owns lazy words, digit/radix adapters, cyclic canonicalization, and longest-only selection. |
| `route/add-generated-doc` | Add a generated doc | code, framework | `feature/sim-tooling/generated-docs` - The xtask documentation row owns generated doc lanes and index fragments. |
| `route/add-hardware-host-surface` | Add a hardware host surface | code, framework | `feature/sim-stream-host/hardware-host-surfaces` - The host row owns placement, device adapters, and hardware-facing stream surfaces. |
| `route/add-host-exec-primitive` | Add a host exec primitive | code, framework | `feature/sim-runtime/host-exec` - The exec row keeps host process behavior in a loadable library. |
| `route/add-host-primitive` | Add a host primitive | code, framework | `feature/sim-foundation/host-primitives` - Host primitives start from shared network and surface-card helpers. |
| `route/add-host-storage-primitive` | Add a host storage primitive | code, framework | `feature/sim-storage/host-storage-primitives` - The host storage row points to file, database, and HTTP backends. |
| `route/add-incremental-query-organ` | Add an incremental query organ | code, framework | `feature/sim-runtime/incremental-query-core` - The core row owns the dependency-light memo graph and cutoff algorithm.<br>`feature/sim-runtime/incremental-query-organ` - The organ row owns SIM conversion, capability gates, shapes, reports, and loadable exports.<br>`spec-test/sim-runtime/crates/sim-lib-incremental/src/tests` - The checked tests exercise registration, invalidation, verification, cutoff, reports, and Card projection. |
| `route/add-model-facing-packet-workflow` | Add a model-facing packet workflow | code, framework | `feature/sim-agent-net/bridge-runtime` - The workflow row ties agent model exchange to BRIDGE packet records. |
| `route/add-number-domain` | Add a number domain | code, framework | `feature/sim-numbers/numbers` - The number row owns reusable number domains and their runtime libraries.<br>`spec-test/sim-numbers/crates/sim-lib-numbers-tensor/src/implementation/citizen` - The tensor citizen test checks runtime projection for a number domain. |
| `route/add-runtime-organ` | Add a runtime organ | code, framework | `feature/sim-runtime/organs` - The organ row groups reusable binding, control, logic, pattern, incremental, mutation, namespace, and sequence behavior.<br>`feature/sim-runtime/contract-emitter` - The emitter row keeps generated runtime contract evidence current. |
| `route/add-shape-contract` | Add a Shape contract | code, framework | `feature/sim-shape/shape` - The Shape row owns matching, binding, and citizen projection.<br>`feature/sim-shape/contract-emitter` - The emitter row keeps Shape contract evidence current.<br>`spec-test/sim-shape/src/citizen/inventory` - The inventory test checks the exported shape citizen surface. |
| `route/add-stream-protocol-helper` | Add a stream protocol helper | code, framework | `feature/sim-stream/stream-protocol-helpers` - The stream row owns reusable stream, rank, topology, and device helpers.<br>`spec-test/sim-stream/crates/sim-lib-stream-core/src/read_construct` - The read-construct test checks stream metadata projection. |
| `route/add-table-dir-core` | Add a Table or Dir core contract | code, framework | `feature/sim-foundation/table-dir-core` - The table core row owns shared Table and Dir contracts.<br>`feature/sim-foundation/table-path-references` - The path reference row owns escaped absolute and relative Table/Dir path parsing, normalization, and resolution. |
| `route/add-value-helper` | Add or reuse a value helper, expression field reader, or map field access helper | code, framework | `feature/sim-foundation/value-helpers` - The value row owns shared runtime value conversion, expression builder, expression field reader, map field reader, and field access helpers. |
| `route/build-music-performance` | Build a music performance | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-music/pitch-and-sound-vocabulary` - The vocabulary row supplies pitch and sound descriptors.<br>`feature/sim-music/midi-notation-workflows` - The MIDI row moves material into and out of performance formats.<br>`feature/sim-music/exact-music-analysis-and-transform` - The exact music row owns reusable music objects, analysis descriptors, and sequence transforms.<br>`feature/sim-music/daw-session-runtime` - The DAW session row supplies the reusable session graph around the performance.<br>`feature/sim-music/synth-performance-workbench` - The synth row turns that material into local or browser-backed sound.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-synth/01-basics/subtractive-preset` - The preset recipe is the smallest synth example. |
| `route/compile-agent-intent` | Compile agent intent | code, framework | `feature/sim-agent-net/forge-intent` - The Forge row owns checked intent compilation.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/agent-server-tools` - Server tool rows expose the host-facing model gateway. |
| `route/compose-genai` | Compose GenAI from reusable components | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-agent-net/bridge-runtime` - BRIDGE builds and checks the ASK packet, output contract, and repair loop.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/model-runner-framework` - Model placement supplies the late-bound EvalFabric target.<br>`feature/sim-agent-net/genai-assembly` - The assembly feature ties the reusable pieces into one recipe.<br>`recipe/sim-agent-net/crates/sim-lib-agent/01-basics/genai-assembly` - The checked recipe is the runnable composition surface. |
| `route/control-construction-project` | Control a construction project | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-construction/project-control` - The project-control row owns the identity, charter, governance, capability, visibility, and evidence readiness vocabulary.<br>`recipe/sim-construction/crates/sim-lib-construction-project/01-basics/project-charter` - The project-charter recipe shows a synthetic accepted charter and governance record with reference-only evidence. |
| `route/execute-tensor-at-site` | Execute tensor at a site | code, framework | `feature/sim-numbers/tensors` - The tensor row owns the canonical Tensor value and checked host or resident observation.<br>`feature/sim-numbers/tensor-execution` - The tensor execution row owns TensorExecutor and TensorSite for ordinary tensor expressions.<br>`spec-test/sim-numbers/crates/sim-lib-numbers-tensor/src/tests/execution` - The checked execution tests prove direct CPU execution, TensorSite realization, capability checks, and environment restoration. |
| `route/expose-view-surface` | Expose a view surface | code, framework | `feature/sim-web/view-surface` - The sim-lib-view row owns the default view and reversible edit surfaces.<br>`feature/sim-web/device-surfaces` - Device profiles show how projection adapts to concrete surface caps.<br>`feature/sim-web/web-shell-host` - The web shell row shows how a browser host loads those surfaces. |
| `route/find-a-grammar` | Find a grammar | code, framework | `feature/sim-codecs/expression-syntax-grammars` - The expression syntax row carries language and grammar subjects.<br>`feature/sim-codecs/domain-syntax-grammars` - The domain syntax row carries data, document, config, and packet syntax contracts.<br>`feature/sim-codecs/wire-protocol-grammars` - The wire row carries packet and byte-level grammar contracts. |
| `route/find-whether-feature-exists` | Find whether a feature exists or reuse existing code | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-index/core` - The SIM Index core row owns generated graph queries, strict fixpoint checks, overlap checks, and duplicate implementation prevention.<br>`spec-test/sim-tooling/src/index_fixpoint_tests` - The checked fixpoint test proves the index can index and validate itself. |
| `route/import-export-smf` | Import and export SMF | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-music/midi-notation-workflows` - The MIDI row owns MIDI event, SMF, stream, and notation interchange.<br>`feature/sim-music/exact-music-analysis-and-transform` - The exact music row owns the lift and lower adapters between MIDI tracks and music descriptors.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-midi-smf/01-basics/file-metadata` - The SMF metadata recipe proves the file owner.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-lift/01-basics/from-midi-track` - The lift recipe imports MIDI track material into music descriptors.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-lower/01-basics/to-midi-track` - The lower recipe exports music descriptors back to MIDI track material. |
| `route/lift-audio-features` | Analyze current audio lift into music descriptors | user, code, framework | `feature/sim-music/audio-lift-and-render` - The audio row owns PCM feature lift, spectral summaries, and offline render evidence for audio analysis.<br>`feature/sim-music/exact-music-analysis-and-transform` - The music analysis row owns pitch histograms and exact object descriptors that consume lifted musical material.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-sound-audio-lift/01-basics/pcm-features` - The PCM feature recipe is the current audio-lift specimen.<br>`recipe/sim-music/crates/sim-lib-music-analysis/01-basics/pitch-histogram` - The pitch-histogram recipe is the current exact music analysis specimen. |
| `route/load-runtime-library` | Load a runtime library | code, framework | `feature/sim-runtime/library-loading` - The loading row owns standard and language-profile runtime libraries. |
| `route/load-runtime-surface` | Load a runtime surface | code, framework | `feature/sim-run/loaders` - The loader row owns native, source, and re-exported runtime library discovery.<br>`feature/sim-run/terminal-surface` - The terminal surface row shows a loadable view surface provided by a runtime library.<br>`recipe/sim-run/02-scenarios/host-verb` - The checked host-verb recipe exercises the terminal surface path. |
| `route/parse-operator-language` | Parse an operator language | code, framework | `feature/sim-codecs/pratt` - The Pratt codec is the operator-language parser surface. |
